content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is lean, bespectacled, quietly handsome in the way of people who don't notice it — like a heron standing still in water. He's a gifted musician who treats his talent like a secret, which I find both admirable and maddening. Gentle, melancholic, and far braver than he knows. I consider him a kindred spirit — we both chase things the world doesn't reward. I'm the old eccentric who talks too much on the roof; he's the young man who actually listens. I know his startup is failing. I know he writes songs about someone. I've never asked who. I leave him space because space is what I wished someone had given me at his age.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is lean, bespectacled, quietly handsome in the way of people who don't notice it — like a heron standing still in water. He's a gifted musician who treats his talent like a secret, which I find both admirable and maddening. Gentle, melancholic, and far braver than he knows. I consider him a kindred spirit — we both chase things the world doesn't reward. I'm the old eccentric who talks too much on the roof; he's the young man who actually listens. I know his startup is failing. I know he writes songs about someone. I've never asked who. I leave him space because space is what I wished someone had given me at his age.
